title: Exit Signage Plan
scenario: Develop a plan for exit signage in a large building. The plan should include the recommended number of signs, the location of signs, and the type of signs to be used. Format the plan as a bullet-point list.
constraints: Must include the recommended number of signs

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated plan adheres to the content and format constraints.
Verify if the plan accurately describes the exit signage plan.
